blended.narrative: Jay Peak is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 5,850 ft. Looking ahead, 18 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Saturday: 5" of snow, highs of 23°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 42°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 4" of snow, highs of 27°F. Expect powder.
